AbsolutePath.description: Absolute filesystem path starting with / or ~

ImageName.description: Docker image name with optional tag

InsertLocation.description: Where to insert content in file

GutenbergSpecPath.description: Path to a Gutenberg page specification YAML file. Input to the Gutenberg rendering pipeline.
GutenbergSpecPath.purpose: Define page structure and content for rendering via validate_schema → render_page → snapshot_html → deploy_directory

HTMLFilePath.description: Path to a rendered HTML document. Output from gutenberg_render_page, input to gutenberg_snapshot_html and pages_helper_deploy_directory.
HTMLFilePath.purpose: Represents a complete, ready-to-deploy HTML page with all styles and content embedded

ImageFilePath.description: Path to an image file (PNG, JPEG, etc.). Output from gutenberg_snapshot_html, used for QA and visual regression testing.
ImageFilePath.purpose: Screenshot of rendered HTML for visual verification and quality assurance before deployment

CloudflareURL.description: Live deployment URL on Cloudflare Pages. Output from pages_helper_deploy_directory.
CloudflareURL.purpose: Represents a live, publicly accessible website deployed to Cloudflare Pages with HTTPS and global CDN

result.description: Results from this step to pass to subsequent steps

decision.description: For branching flows, which path to take

reason.description: Why the flow is being paused (for debugging/logging)

prompt.description: Question or prompt for the user/agent

requested_inputs.description: Specification of inputs needed to resume

instance_id.description: Optional: Flow instance ID to resume (defaults to current session)

inputs.description: Input values requested by the pause

path.description: Absolute path to the flow YAML file

input.description: Initial input variables for the flow

command.description: The bash command to check for anti-patterns

force.description: If true, execute the command anyway even if anti-pattern detected. Default: false

metric.description: What to compare by. Default: reliability

limit.description: How many tools to show. Default: 10

order.description: Show best or worst performers. Default: best

detail_level.description: How much detail to include in the review. Default: detailed

time_window.description: Time period to analyze. Default: last_hour (current session)

tool_name.description: Name of the tool to get metrics for

time_window.description: Time period to analyze. Default: all_time
Time period to analyze. Default: all_time

intent.description: Optional: what you're trying to understand (e.g., 'system health', 'errors', 'performance')

tool_name.description: Name of the tool being tracked

success.description: Whether the call succeeded. Default: true

spec_path.description: Absolute path to the Gutenberg page specification YAML file. Must pass validation (valid=true from validate_schema).

output_dir.description: Optional: Directory to write rendered HTML. Defaults to pages/rendered/. Directory is created if it doesn't exist.

html_path.description: Absolute path to the rendered HTML file. File is ready for deployment or further processing (screenshots, QA, etc.). All CSS is embedded (no external CDN).
Absolute path to rendered HTML file. Must be valid HTML output from render_page. File is read from disk and rendered in headless Chromium.

output_dir.description: Optional: Directory to write screenshot PNG. Defaults to pages/snapshots/. Directory is created if it doesn't exist.

width.description: Browser viewport width in pixels for rendering. Default 1440 (desktop). Use 375 for mobile preview.

height.description: Browser viewport height in pixels. Default 900. Full page is always captured vertically.

image_path.description: Absolute path to the full-page screenshot PNG file. Ready for QA, visual regression testing, or documentation.

spec_path.description: Absolute path to the Gutenberg page specification YAML file to validate. Must be valid YAML with required 'page' root key.

valid.description: True if spec has no blocking validation errors and can be safely rendered

message.description: Detailed error message explaining what's wrong and how to fix it

errors.description: Blocking validation errors that prevent rendering. Fix these before calling render_page.

warnings.description: Non-blocking suggestions for improvement (missing SEO metadata, accessibility, etc.)

orchestration_id.description: ID of the orchestration to cancel

items.description: Array of items to process (e.g., file paths, IDs, names)

flows.description: Array of flow paths to run in sequence for each item (e.g., ['publish.yaml', 'visual-qa.yaml'])

input_template.description: Template for flow inputs. Supports variables: {item}, {index}, {orchestration_id}

concurrency.description: Number of items to process in parallel (default: 3)

orchestration_id.description: ID of the completed orchestration with failures

flows.description: Optional: Override flow sequence for retry (defaults to original flows)

orchestration_id.description: ID of the orchestration to check

item.description: Item name or identifier to update

result.description: Optional result object from flow execution

error.description: Optional error message if status is 'error'

project_name.description: Name of the Cloudflare Pages project (lowercase-hyphenated). E.g., 'my-site', 'company-blog'. Must be unique within account.

url.description: Project base URL (https://{project_name}.pages.dev). Individual deployments get unique subdomains.

status.description: Whether project was newly created or already existed (idempotent operation)

project_name.description: Cloudflare Pages project name (lowercase-hyphenated, e.g., 'my-site'). Auto-creates project if needed.

directory.description: Absolute path to directory containing files to deploy. Recursively reads all files. Must include index.html for root URL access.

branch.description: Optional preview branch name for staging deployments (defaults to 'main'). Allows multiple deployments per project.

short_id.description: Short deployment ID (8 characters, used in URL)

created_on.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when deployment was created

latest_stage.description: Current deployment stage status (queued, initialize, build, deploy, etc.)

project_name.description: Name of the Cloudflare Pages project to retrieve (lowercase-hyphenated)

url.description: Project base URL (https://{name}.pages.dev). Each deployment gets a unique subdomain.

input.description: No parameters required. Lists all Cloudflare Pages projects accessible with current credentials.

projects.description: Array of all Cloudflare Pages projects in the account

tools.name: check_consistency
tools.description: Validate all MCPs follow conventions and best practices

servers.description: Optional: list of servers to check (e.g., ['flowbot', 'gutenberg']). If not provided, checks all known servers.

tools.name: debug_schema
tools.description: Debug the schema pipeline when tools aren't showing up in rosetta.schema.json

tool_name.description: Optional: specific tool name to debug (e.g., 'done', 'render_page')

tools.name: rebuild
tools.description: Rebuild schema with change detection and feedback

force.description: Force rebuild even if no changes detected (default: false)

recursive.description: Create parent directories if needed. Default: true

path.description: Directory path to search in. Default: current working directory

max_depth.description: Maximum directory depth to traverse. Default: 10

case_sensitive.description: Whether pattern matching is case-sensitive. Default: true

exclude_dirs.description: Directory names to exclude from search. Default: ['node_modules', '.git', 'dist', 'build', '.next', 'coverage']

files_only.description: Return only files (not directories). Default: true

intent.description: Optional: what you're looking for, in natural language. Used for smart sampling.

depth.description: Max directory depth to traverse. Default: 4

include_samples.description: Include first 10 lines of key files. Default: false
